title: Close the M3 ordinary life simulation gate
summary: Close M3 only after ordinary-life scenario, architecture, implementation, save/replay, Worker parity, benchmarks and invariants are verified and integrated, then write a non-executable future M4 entry prompt.
acceptance: All M3 task packets WM-0046 through WM-0059 are verified integrated and done before closeout completion
Closeout report records final scenario hashes artifact paths benchmark comparison Worker parity save/replay evidence residual risks and known warnings
Future M4 entry prompt is written to coordination/reports/WM-0060-future-m4-entry-prompt.md as a non-executable handoff artifact for a later reviewed M4 planning task
The injury-to-work-medical-logistics-mood-relationship gate passes with structured explanations
Roadmap milestone and project-state status are updated narrowly to reflect M3 closeout evidence
No M4 task is created promoted claimed or implemented by this closeout task and the future prompt explicitly says it must not be executed as part of WM-0060

history.details: Created by WM-0045 M3 planning DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.

Closed M3 evidence in roadmap/project-state/report files, wrote non-executable future M4 prompt, ran ci:local bench sim:run validate-handoff taskctl validate/status diff-check and quality; no M4 task created or implemented.
verified: No blocking findings; acceptance evidence confirmed
Reviewed WM-0060 closeout accepted; integration gates passed: validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, pnpm quality.

objective: Close M3 with reviewed evidence and write a future M4 entry prompt while keeping M4 blocked until a later reviewed planning task.
forbiddenPaths: M4 task DAG creation promotion claim or implementation
M4 runtime product planning beyond the non-executable future entry prompt artifact
benchmarkImpact: Final M3 benchmark artifact comparison and gate verdict; no threshold changes.
reviewRouting: Project-director completes to reviewer; reviewer verifies closeout evidence, future M4 prompt content and M4-unstarted status before any integration. Integration and done remain separate taskctl steps after reviewer verification.
rollbackModel: Leave M3 open, revert the closeout report and future M4 prompt artifact, do not promote M4, and route blockers to the responsible owner task.
ownerGate: Do not fix product code in closeout
Confirm every upstream M3 task is verified integrated and done
Record hashes artifacts warnings residual risks and exact checks
Write the future M4 entry prompt as a non-executable handoff artifact only
Do not create promote claim or implement M4 work

sparkEligibility.reason: Milestone closeout and final coordination gates cannot be assigned to Spark.

review.summary: No blocking findings; acceptance evidence confirmed

integration.summary: Reviewed WM-0060 closeout accepted; integration gates passed: validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, pnpm quality.
